title: Lilavati Hospital and Research Centre expands its footprint in Gujarat
summary: Lilavati Hospital and Research Centre has announced its expansion into Gujarat with the launch of its upcoming facility in GIFT City, Gandhinagar. Located in GIFT City, the new facility is […]
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Located in GIFT City, the new facility is poised to enhance access to advanced medical services for patients across Gujarat and neighboring states

Lilavati Hospital and Research Centre has announced its expansion into Gujarat with the launch of its upcoming facility in GIFT City, Gandhinagar. 

Located in GIFT City, the new facility is poised to enhance access to advanced medical services for patients across Gujarat and neighboring states. 

Talking about the launch, Prashant K Mehta, Director of Lilavati Hospital, Gift City said “Healthcare, to us, has never been just about treatment, it is about dignity, compassion, and reaching those who need care the most. As we expand into Gujarat, our foremost commitment is to ensure that no individual is denied access to quality medical services. This initiative is a step towards building a healthier, more inclusive community, where care is not a privilege, but a shared responsibility. My parents Shri Kishor Mehta & Smt. Charuben Mehta who are the founding permanent trustees of Lilavati Hospital Mumbai remain primary advisors with their great expertise of the Lilavati Hospital Gift City as well.”

As part of the inaugural activities, the hospital is also organising a one month free medical check up camp from 20th April to 20th May, from 10:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m., aimed at supporting underprivileged communities. The camp includes full body health checkups and medical consultations, underscoring the hospital’s ongoing commitment to community welfare and preventive healthcare.
